executives.name: David Cates
executives.background: Mr. Cates is the President and Chief Executive Officer of Denison and serves on the Board of Directors. He is a Chartered Professional Accountant (CPA, CA) and holds a Master of Accounting (MAcc) and a Bachelor of Arts (BA) degree from the University of Waterloo. Prior to his appointment as President and CEO, he served as Denison's Vice President Finance and Chief Financial Officer.

tenure_dates.title: Vice President Finance and Chief Financial Officer

executives.name: Elizabeth Freele
executives.background: Ms. Freele is the Vice President, Sustainability and Chief ESG Officer. She is a sustainability professional with over 15 years of experience in the natural resources sector, specializing in ESG strategy, risk management, and stakeholder engagement.

tenure_dates.title: Vice President, Sustainability and Chief ESG Officer

executives.name: Kevin Himbeault
executives.background: Mr. Himbeault is the Vice President, Operations and Regulatory Affairs. He has over 25 years of experience in the mining industry, with a focus on environmental management, regulatory compliance, and operations in the uranium sector.

tenure_dates.title: Vice President, Operations and Regulatory Affairs

executives.name: Geoffrey Smith
executives.background: Mr. Smith is the Vice President, Corporate Development and Commercial. He is a corporate lawyer by training and has extensive experience in mergers and acquisitions, corporate finance, and commercial negotiations in the mining industry.

tenure_dates.title: Vice President, Corporate Development and Commercial

board_of_directors.name: Ron Hochstein
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Hochstein is the Chair of the Board. He is currently the President and CEO of Lundin Gold Inc. and has over 30 years of experience in the mining industry.

board_of_directors.name: David Cates
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Cates is the President and CEO of the Company. See executive profile for further details.

board_of_directors.name: Brian Edgar
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Edgar is a lawyer and has served as a director of numerous public companies. He was the President and CEO of Dome Ventures Corp. until its merger with Vicuna Resources Inc.

board_of_directors.name: Alice Wong
board_of_directors.background: Ms. Wong is a Senior Vice President and Chief Corporate Officer at Cameco Corporation. She has extensive experience in corporate strategy, investor relations, and sustainability.
committees: Environment, Health, Safety and Sustainability Committee

board_of_directors.name: Jennifer Traub
board_of_directors.background: Ms. Traub is a partner at the law firm Cassels Brock & Blackwell LLP, where she co-chairs the Mining Group. She has extensive experience in corporate finance and M&A in the resource sector.
